name: Donkey Kick (Cable or Band)
setup: On all fours (hands under shoulders, knees under hips)
Attach cable/band to foot or hold dumbbell behind knee
execution: Kick working foot toward ceiling, keeping knee bent at 90 degrees
Squeeze glute at top, foot goes no higher than parallel to floor
Lower under control without touching floor
common_mistakes: Arching lower back (should be all glute, not spine)
cues: Keep core braced — don't let back arch
